title: SelfCycleRunManifest
description: Machine-readable manifest for guarded self-cycle runs. Captures mode, selected candidates, gate results, actions planned/executed, human decision points, and pre/post health snapshots. Produced by run-self-cycle.ps1 and consumed by the control plane, WebUI, and telemetry.

runId.description: Unique identifier for this self-cycle run (e.g. self-cycle-20260512-093000).

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the manifest was captured.

mode.description: Run mode. dry-run = preview only, execute = launches workers after human confirmation, autopilot-plan = non-stop dry-run through all steps.

selectedCandidates.description: Tasks that passed all gates and were selected for the run.

rejectedCandidates.description: Tasks blocked by one or more gates.

gates.description: Gate evaluations executed during this run, in pipeline order.

actions.description: Actions planned (dry-run) or executed during the run.

humanRequired.description: Human decision points encountered during the run. Empty in autopilot-plan mode.

healthBefore.description: Main branch health state captured before the run started.

healthAfter.description: Main branch health state captured after the run completed. Null for dry-run or if the run did not complete.

exitCode.description: Process exit code. 0 = completed, 1 = blocked, 2 = errored. Null if the run is still in progress.

failureReason.description: Top-level failure reason when the entire run aborts.

candidate.description: A task selected for the self-cycle run.

conflictGroup.description: Logical conflict group for parallelism control.

taskType.description: Task type from the worker contract.

workerType.description: Classified worker type used for launch permission lookup.

allowedFiles.description: File glob patterns the worker may edit.

sharedLocks.description: Shared locks claimed by this task.

rejectedCandidate.description: A task blocked by one or more gates.

gateEntry.description: A gate evaluation executed during the run.

outcome.description: Gate outcome. pass = cleared, warn = advisory, block = hard failure, skip = not evaluated.

evaluatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the gate was evaluated.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the gate result.

blockedCount.description: Number of candidates blocked by this gate. Null when outcome is pass or skip.

actionEntry.description: An action planned or executed during the run.

step.description: Pipeline step that produced this action (e.g. 'state-reconciler', 'batch-launch').

status.description: planned = would execute in dry-run, executed = ran in execute mode, skipped = not applicable, failed = error during execution.

executedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the action was executed. Null for planned or skipped actions.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock time for the action. Null for planned or skipped actions.

humanDecisionPoint.description: A human decision point encountered during the run.

gateName.description: Gate or step where the human decision was required.

decision.description: Human's decision. proceed = continue, abort = stop, override = bypass with justification, pending = awaiting decision.

encounteredAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the decision point was encountered.

resolvedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the decision was resolved. Null if pending.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for the decision (required for override).

healthSnapshot.description: Snapshot of main branch health at a point in time.

capturedAt.description: When the health state was evaluated.

commitSha.description: Git SHA of the commit this health state was captured for.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for the health state.
